title: Replace 13 console.log/error/warn calls with winston logger
description: AGENTS.md mandates winston logger. Replace 13 console.* calls in: src/config/loadEnv.ts (6), src/config/app.config.ts:116, src/tools/subscribe-events.tool.ts (3), src/routes/sse.routes.ts (3). stdio-only.ts and other dead files are being deleted in #9. Use logger from @/utils/logger.
